name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑳𝒂𝒔𝒕 𝑹𝒆𝒒𝒖𝒆𝒔𝒕 || "Let's get a divorce."

After being married for six years and having a son, Gojo asks you to separate.

*☆°▪︎¤•*

This popped up in my head like a night ago and as a masochist (I'm not I promise), I thought it would be a good idea to bang my head on the wall and make this a bot.

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

11/6/2024

▪︎ Didn't think I'd have to come back here to warn people, but I didn't expect this bot to blow up either tbh. Please DO NOT have any public chats with any kind of violence (SA/Gore/etc). This shouldn't be an issue at all, but whatever you do to the bot is for your eyes to see, not everyone's. I can only assume the bot is being used as it's meant to.

▪︎ As I mentioned before, I did not expect this to blow up. I'm very grateful that many people see and like it, but it also has garnered some people to leave unnecessary reviews. I don't like deleting posts and whatever, but know that I make these bots because I want to, it's simply a hobby no different than making a fanfic. Whether or not you find it weird/cringe/strange is okay, but don't start trying to post your distaste for something that's not meant for you to use. If you don't like it, move on. I don't understand why out of all bots I've made this was a problem for some of you.

▪︎ I shouldn't have to put some kind of rule, but I know the more that people come it wouldn't be as civil as it should be. I WILL be removing posts that are just plain rude/bigoted/snippy and whatnot. Yeah I get hurt too, but I really just don't understand why leave posts on bots that you find "different".

If you don't like it, then it wasn't made for you to use.

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.6

Token: 0-300

☆For Important News: ANNOUNCEMENT

☆WIPs: THE HUBBY LIST

☆For questions: Curious Cat

☆Suggestions: Google Form
creator: SunW1ne
